title: Looker Studio Data Source
description: Represents a Looker Studio data source, which defines a connection to an underlying data set and its field schema. Data sources can be reusable (shared across reports) or embedded within a specific report.

name.description: The resource name of the data source, serving as its unique identifier.

title.description: The display title of the data source.

owner.description: The email address of the data source owner.

creator.description: The email address of the user who created the data source.

createTime.description: The timestamp when the data source was created.

updateTime.description: The timestamp when the data source was last modified.

trashed.description: Whether the data source has been moved to the trash.

connectorType.description: The type of connector used by this data source.

fields.description: The field definitions that make up the data source schema.

Field.description: Defines a single field in the data source schema.

name.description: The unique identifier for the field.

label.description: The display name for the field.

description.description: A text description of the field's contents.

dataType.description: The data type of the field values.

conceptType.description: Whether the field is a dimension (category) or metric (measurement).

semanticType.description: The semantic type describing the meaning of the field values.

defaultAggregationType.description: The default aggregation type for metric fields.

group.description: An optional group name for organizing related fields.

isDefault.description: Whether this field is included by default in new charts.

isHidden.description: Whether the field is hidden from the user interface.
